working_on: Engine apparatus improvements per approved plan: (1) GitHub Issues as cross-session deferral destination + boot-time backlog visibility + scope-collision detection, (2) rewrite health-check around 'is it doing work?' with multi-axis orphan scanner, (3) scope-lock at boot + descope/reorder audit at shutdown, (4) session-end context telemetry feeding cross-session bundling judgment. User-directed displacement of the planned Phase 5 epistemology build-readiness gate (slips to S-0043+ per STATE.md's documented displacement clause).
declared_scope: Land Interventions 1-3 + cross-cutting telemetry per ADR 0048 + ADR 0049 + the approved plan: HANDOFF/Issues split with boot backlog visibility and scope-collision check; multi-axis dead-weight scanner and rewritten health-check; declared_scope at boot + scope-delivery audit at shutdown + multi-session erosion signal + gate clause; session-end context telemetry feeding the health-check session-load trend. phase: NA-engine-apparatus (operational session; no build-plan phase identifier).
outcome_summary: Engine apparatus improvements landed end-to-end per approved plan: ADRs 0048 (HANDOFF/Issues split) + 0049 (scope-lock + telemetry). Six new Python tools (scan_issue_backlog/collisions/orphans/context_telemetry; validate.py extensions for issue_collision + scope_discipline; audit_handoff_dispositions fifth pattern). Two new ops-doc surfaces (issue-discipline.md; rewritten health-check around 'is it doing work?' diagnostic with the user-corrected orphan lens). Three Skill mirrors. CLAUDE.md fix-in-context section updated. Validator check count 17 → 21. Full suite 434 passing; ruff + mypy --strict clean. Verification: 7 GitHub labels confirmed; Issues #1 (wing-filter) + #2 (wing-naming) filed as seed bug+upstream entries; backlog scanner emits FYI line; collision scanner soft-warns against this session's scope on both Issues (working as intended). 2 expected issue_collision soft-warns at close. Phase 5 gate slips to S-0043.

scope_delivery.explanation: All four interventions plus the cross-cutting telemetry landed cleanly. Build-readiness gate report authored with cold-review pass per ADR 0040 step 8. ADRs 0048 + 0049 authored with full Context/Decision/Consequences. Six new tools all unit-tested. Three Skill mirrors updated per ADR 0044 doc → skill direction. End-to-end verification ran clean. No descoping or reordering relative to the declared scope; user did not redirect mid-session.

side_discoveries.reasoning: False positive. The word 'flagged' appears in the literal text of the new build-readiness gate clause being authored: 'Any reduction OR reordering of declared deliverables vs the build-plan chunk's stated scope must be flagged to the user explicitly...' This is not a deferral marker but the contract being committed.

The deferral is a documented Tier 3 forward pointer in the gate report itself: dead-weight triage of the scanner-surfaced candidates (ideation.md, sub-agent-validation.md, tools-sweep-worktrees.md, etc.) is the next health-check's work, not this session's. The gate report's T3-E names the deferral with its decide-before trigger (S-0051 health-check audit). This is the correct shape per ADR 0040 Tier 3 discipline; it is not a silent defer-pattern instance.
